title: Curator pass: critical memory-surface drain lane opened
body: Solo curator continuation: opened .agent/plans/agentic-engineering-enhancements/current/memory-surface-critical-drain-2026-05-24.plan.md as the explicit remediation lane for the post-napkin critical surfaces. The active napkin is processed and healthy; remaining pressure is distilled.md, pending-graduations.md, and repo-continuity.md. Plan separates owner-gated doctrine decisions from agent-actionable drain work and keeps knowledge preservation ahead of fitness. Markdownlint and diff check passed; fitness remains CRITICAL (3 critical, 3 hard, 13 soft).
